notes: Polish correction after v4.3.192: restores visible warm line icons in the sidebar, brand mark, and home dashboard instead of relying on pseudo-element background icons that could disappear.
Keeps the icons close to the approved Option 1 sample: thin, warm, line-based, and not bright yellow-green game symbols.
Improves readability by enlarging small card/detail text, badges, and plant-lane cards, and by reducing overly heavy type weights.
No species records, source data, image fields, edible statuses, toxicity statuses, medicinal action logic, Other Uses logic, Needs Review logic, or map features changed.
